queries.question: Provide a list of all short stories and also provide a list of personal essays written by Evelyn O'Connor.
queries.sql:
SELECT Articles.Title 
FROM WritingStyles JOIN Articles ON WritingStyles.id = Articles.WritingStyleId JOIN Authors ON Articles.AuthorId = Authors.id
WHERE WritingStyles.StyleName = "Short Story" OR WritingStyles.StyleName = "Personal Essay" AND Authors.Name = "Evelyn O'Connor"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?writingstyles a :WritingStyles .
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?articles p:hasWritingStyles ?writingstyles .
  ?authors a :Authors .
  ?articles p:hasAuthors ?authors .
  ?articles p:Title ?title .
  ?writingstyles p:StyleName ?stylename_w .
  ?writingstyles p:StyleName ?stylename_w2 .
  ?authors p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?stylename_w) = "Short Story" || (STR(?stylename_w2) = "Personal Essay" && STR(?name_w) = "Evelyn O'Connor")))
}

queries.question: Show short stories and personal essays written by Evelyn O'Connor.
queries.sql:
SELECT Articles.Title 
FROM WritingStyles JOIN Articles ON WritingStyles.id = Articles.WritingStyleId JOIN Authors ON Articles.AuthorId = Authors.id
WHERE (WritingStyles.StyleName = "Short Story" OR WritingStyles.StyleName = "Personal Essay") AND Authors.Name = "Evelyn O'Connor"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?writingstyles a :WritingStyles .
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?articles p:hasWritingStyles ?writingstyles .
  ?authors a :Authors .
  ?articles p:hasAuthors ?authors .
  ?articles p:Title ?title .
  ?writingstyles p:StyleName ?stylename_w .
  ?writingstyles p:StyleName ?stylename_w2 .
  ?authors p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?stylename_w) = "Short Story" || STR(?stylename_w2) = "Personal Essay")) && STR(?name_w) = "Evelyn O'Connor"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show short stories and personal essays written by Evelyn O'Connor.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  low: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?writingstyles a :WritingStyles .
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?articles p:hasWritingStyles ?writingstyles .
  ?authors a :Authors .
  ?articles p:hasAuthors ?authors .
  ?articles p:Title ?title .
  ?writingstyles p:StyleName ?stylename_w .
  ?writingstyles p:StyleName ?stylename_w2 .
  ?authors p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?stylename_w) = "Short Story" || (STR(?stylename_w2) = "Personal Essay" && STR(?name_w) = "Evelyn O'Connor")))
} }
  high: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?writingstyles a :WritingStyles .
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?articles p:hasWritingStyles ?writingstyles .
  ?authors a :Authors .
  ?articles p:hasAuthors ?authors .
  ?articles p:Title ?title .
  ?writingstyles p:StyleName ?stylename_w .
  ?writingstyles p:StyleName ?stylename_w2 .
  ?authors p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?stylename_w) = "Short Story" || STR(?stylename_w2) = "Personal Essay")) && STR(?name_w) = "Evelyn O'Connor"))
} }
}
